creator: crow@localhost.hu
text:
I send this mail for the PR system, because I can't reach the author (he's email address isn't valid).

       Can the maintainer merge the blackbox icon patch 
(WWW: http://bbtools.thelinuxcommunity.org/sources/patches/blackbox-taskbar-patches-0.4.tar.gz) 
into the current blackbox port? I think, it is a good idea, because the bb 
taskbar is very usefull, and the merge doesn't affects the default install.
